title: Stonecutter Wand
description: A compact builder tool that cycles blocks in the world using stonecutter recipes.
body:
Stonecutter Wand

A builder’s scalpel for block variants. The Stonecutter Wand lets you cycle blocks directly in the world using stonecutter recipes, no menus, no crafting benches. Just right-click and sculpt.

Features:
Swap block variants with a click. Right-click any block to cycle through its stonecutter variants, no menus, no crafting, no hassle.

1. Smart variant detection. Uses Minecraft’s recipe system to group related blocks like stairs, slabs, and polished types, no hardcoded lists.

Bind and match. Sneak-right-click to bind a block, then transform others to match. Perfect for palette cleanup and build consistency.

Orientation-aware. Stairs and directional blocks keep their facing, so everything lines up without manual fixing.

Tooltips show your bound block, current mode, and available variants.

Future Plans:
- Keybind Controls
- Multi-block Support
